name: Solvar Limited
analysis: SVR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5100, stop A$1.3711, target A$1.6950 (1.33:1) — then trail it.
